## Why this should be a separate domain

- Which repeated questions do not fit inside the current founding domain?
- Why would a new domain page be cleaner than adding more pages under the existing graph?

## Admission checklist

- [ ] Repeated questions already exist
- [ ] There is more than one usable source
- [ ] The topic is likely to be reused across workers or projects
- [ ] A short domain registry page can define the boundary cleanly
- [ ] I reviewed `wiki/reports/report-domain-expansion-readiness-2026-04-09.md`
